description: Central registry of all MCP servers AND OpenRouter server tools for Arch Systems agents. Fully free servers auto-start; OpenRouter server tools require no local install.

categories.filesystem: Local file access — no external API, fully free
categories.browser: Browser automation via Playwright — no external API, fully free
categories.docker: Container management — uses local Docker daemon, fully free
categories.memory: Persistent knowledge graph — local storage, fully free
categories.reasoning: Structured step-by-step reasoning — pure logic, fully free
categories.database: Database querying — connects to local/self-hosted databases, fully free
categories.codebase: Codebase intelligence — local analysis tools, fully free
categories.search: Web search — requires free-tier API key
categories.github: GitHub API — requires free GitHub token
categories.productivity: Tool/software discovery, project management — requires free-tier keys
categories.sandbox: Cloud sandboxed code execution — 100 hrs/month free
categories.or-server-tools: OpenRouter server-side tools — zero local install, requires OR API key

filesystem.description: Read, write, edit, search files and directories. Scoped to configured paths.

playwright.description: Browser automation for web testing, scraping, and interaction via Playwright.

docker.description: Container management — list, inspect, pull, run containers, manage images and compose stacks.
docker.notes: Requires Docker daemon. Maps host socket.

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph memory using JSON file storage. Entities, relations, observations.

sequential-thinking.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning and problem-solving through sequential thoughts.

postgres.description: PostgreSQL database access — read schemas, execute queries, analyze performance.

sqlite.description: SQLite database exploration — inspect schemas, run queries, CRUD operations.
sqlite.notes: Scoped to crush.db for session/message inspection.

redis.description: Redis in-memory data store access — key-value operations, cache inspection, pub/sub.

context7.description: Codebase summarization with automatic PII masking. Distills large codebases for context injection.

brave-search.description: Web search via Brave Search API. Requires free Brave API key.

toolradar.description: Discover tools and software libraries. Query the open-source tool database.

github.description: GitHub API integration — manage repos, PRs, issues, commits, search code.
github.notes: Free GitHub token with repo scope.

figma.description: Figma design file access — read components, styles, and metadata from Figma files.

notion.description: Notion API integration — read, write, update Notion pages and databases.

e2b.description: Cloud sandboxed code execution. Run arbitrary code in isolated environments.

composio.description: 150+ tool integrations — file I/O, shell commands, web browsing, code execution.
composio.notes: Free tier available with Composio API key.

supabase.description: Supabase project management — SQL queries, schema inspection, bucket management, edge functions.

kilo-mcp.description: Kilo ACP server agent MCP bridge.

serena.description: Oraios Serena — universal codebase intelligence, file operations, and MCP tool execution. No API key needed, fully free.
serena.notes: Zero-cost codebase intelligence. Installed via UVX.

openrouter-subagent.description: Server-side subagent delegation — orchestrator delegates subtasks to a cheaper worker model. No local install. type: openrouter:subagent
openrouter-subagent.notes: OpenRouter server tool. Works with any model that supports tool calling. Parameters: model, task_name, task_description.

openrouter-advisor.description: Consult a stronger model mid-generation as a server tool. No local install. type: openrouter:advisor
openrouter-advisor.notes: OpenRouter server tool. Best for review/verification of the primary model's output.

openrouter-web-search.description: Real-time web search — model-agnostic grounding. No local install. type: openrouter:web_search
openrouter-web-search.notes: OpenRouter server tool. Returns web search results the model can cite.

openrouter-web-fetch.description: Fetch and extract content from URLs. No local install. type: openrouter:web_fetch
openrouter-web-fetch.notes: OpenRouter server tool. Returns extracted page text.

openrouter-datetime.description: Access current date and time. No local install. type: openrouter:datetime
openrouter-datetime.notes: OpenRouter server tool. Zero-cost, no external calls.

openrouter-files.description: Read, write, and list workspace files via OpenRouter. No local install. type: openrouter:files
openrouter-files.notes: OpenRouter server tool. Scoped to permitted paths.

openrouter-bash.description: Sandboxed shell execution via OpenRouter. No local install. type: openrouter:bash

openrouter-image-generation.description: Generate images from text prompts. No local install. type: openrouter:image_generation
openrouter-image-generation.notes: OpenRouter server tool. Uses configured image model.

openrouter-search-models.description: Search the OpenRouter model catalog. No local install. type: openrouter:search_models
openrouter-search-models.notes: OpenRouter server tool. Returns matching models with capabilities.

minimal.description: Zero-cost starter — auto-start servers with no keys needed + free OR server tools

development.description: Full local dev — adds browser, Docker, databases, GitHub, OR subagent

full.description: All servers including key-dependent + all OR server tools
